# Pinned to the versions that produced the committed goldens.json.
# Bumping these may shift the last few float bits; regenerate and review the diff.
numpy==2.4.6
onnxruntime==1.27.0
# generate_realaudio_goldens.py decodes mu-law with the stdlib `audioop` module,
# which was removed from the standard library in Python 3.13. On 3.13+ this backport
# restores it; on <=3.12 it is unused (audioop is built in). Either way, run the
# generators on Python <=3.12 for exact parity with the committed fixtures.
audioop-lts==0.2.1; python_version >= "3.13"
